name: Appliance Repair Vs Replace
description: Maintenance prepares appliance repair-vs-replace decision packets with age, cost, warranty, resident-impact, and owner-choice drafts, with human approval before vendor, owner, resident, spend, purchase, or system action.

stages.name: Normalize Appliance Decision
stages.description: Normalize appliance, work-order, cost, and resident-impact facts.

steps.title: Normalize appliance decision
steps.instructions: Normalize property, unit, appliance type, make/model/serial if known, age, warranty state, issue, resident impact, prior repairs, vendor estimate, replacement options, owner NTE, availability, and missing facts. Unknown age, warranty, repair cost, replacement cost, ROI, urgency, or resident-impact fields must remain null with needs_verification.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize appliance decision facts and missing-data flags. No vendor, owner, resident, spend, purchase, or system action.

steps.title: Check existing work and ownership
steps.instructions: Check whether a human, vendor, or owner already owns the appliance issue; review active work order, warranty claim, prior approval, resident communications, and urgent habitability risk. Do not contact anyone or authorize repair/replacement.
steps.dispatch_body: Check active work, warranty, approval, and ownership context. No external sends or system writes.

stages.name: Draft Decision Packet
stages.description: Prepare repair-vs-replace decision materials without committing spend.

steps.title: Draft appliance decision packet
steps.instructions: Draft decision packet with repair estimate, replacement options, warranty caveats, availability, resident-impact mitigation, owner recommendation caveats, vendor/resident/owner drafts, and needs_verification gaps. Draft-only; do not approve repair, order replacement, dispatch vendor, or send messages.
steps.dispatch_body: Draft appliance decision packet only. No owner/resident/vendor sends, spend, purchase, dispatch, or system writes.

steps.title: Review appliance decision packet
steps.instructions: Review cost support, missing estimates, warranty state, owner approval requirement, resident-impact mitigation, and vendor availability before approval.
steps.human_prompt: Review appliance repair-vs-replace packet before owner, resident, vendor, spend, purchase, or system action.

stages.name: Approve And Stage Decision
stages.description: Human approval gates repair, replacement, purchase, resident, owner, vendor, and system actions.

steps.title: Approve appliance action
steps.instructions: Approve, edit, reject, or request owner approval before any repair authorization, replacement purchase, vendor dispatch, owner decision request, resident update, warranty claim, spend commitment, invoice action, PropertyMeld action, or AppFolio write.
steps.human_prompt: Approval required before appliance repair, replacement, purchase, owner, resident, vendor, warranty, spend, invoice, or system action.

steps.title: Stage approved appliance package
steps.instructions: Stage approved repair or replacement packet, owner/resident/vendor drafts, purchase or warranty metadata if approved, approval source, unresolved needs_verification fields, and next owner for human release. Do not send, purchase, dispatch, authorize spend, invoice, or write systems.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage approved appliance decision package for human release. No external sends, purchase, dispatch, spend, invoice, or system writes.
